# Estiquote — App Store & PWA Listing Copy

## App Name
Estiquote — Home Cost Estimator

## Subtitle (30 chars max)
UK build costs, instantly

## Promotional Text (170 chars — can update without review)
Know what your extension, loft or kitchen should cost before you call a single builder. Free regional estimates — updated for 2026.

## Short Description (for Google Play / PWA stores)
UK home improvement cost intelligence. Get accurate 2026 regional estimates for extensions, loft conversions, kitchens, bathrooms and more — then find vetted local builders and source materials from the UK's best merchants.

## Full Description (App Store — 4000 chars)

Know the number before you call anyone.

Estiquote gives UK homeowners and builders accurate, regional cost estimates for every major home improvement project — updated monthly with real market data.

WHY ESTIQUOTE?
Most homeowners start a project with no idea what it should cost. They call builders blind, get wildly different quotes, and have no way to know if they're being taken advantage of. Estiquote changes that.

ACCURATE 2026 UK ESTIMATES
• Extensions — from £1,700/m² (South East)
• Loft conversions — Velux, dormer, mansard
• Kitchen renovations — budget to premium
• Bathroom fit-outs with minimum cost floors
• Electrical, plumbing, structural works
• Decoration — professional rates

Regional pricing across London, South East, South West, Midlands, North England, Scotland and Wales — powered by BCIS, BMF and ONS data.

FIND VETTED LOCAL BUILDERS
Browse verified builders with real reviews, transparent pricing history and direct contact. Every enquiry is exclusive — your details go to one builder only, not broadcast to five.

Listed builders: £29/month
Featured builders: £59/month (priority placement + analytics)
Pro builders: £99/month (top placement + unlimited photos)

UK CONSTRUCTION MATERIAL PRICES
Track 12 key materials updated monthly. Then find your nearest Jewson, Travis Perkins, Parker Building Supplies, Fairalls and 8 more merchants — sorted by distance from your postcode.

BECOME THE DATA
Submit real prices you've paid at a merchant. Every submission improves the index for all users — and helps build the UK's first open construction price API.

---

PRO PLAN — £9.99/month
Full material price tracker with monthly alerts, saved estimates, PDF export, and priority builder access.

TRADE PLAN — £29/month
Everything in Pro, plus CSV export, API access, and bulk estimate tools.

14-day free trial. Cancel anytime.

## What's New (v1.0 launch)
Welcome to Estiquote — UK home improvement cost intelligence.

NEW
• Accurate 2026 regional cost estimates for 8 trades
• UK-wide merchant finder — 12 merchants, 300+ branches
• Verified builder directory with direct enquiry
• Monthly UK material price tracker (BCIS/BMF data)

Thank you for trying Estiquote. Rate us if you find it useful — every review helps.
